tables: NCR Indian Railway RRC Prayagraj Various Trade Apprentices 2026 Apply Online For 1853 Post

Indian Railway North Central Railway NCR has released Various Trade Apprentices 2024. Those candidates who are interested in this Railway RRC NCR Prayagraj Apprentices  2026 can apply online from 16 September 2024 to 15 October 2024. Read the notification for Apprentices eligibility, post information, selection procedure, Details, age limit, pay scale and all other information.

Railway Recruitment Cell (RRC NCR) NCR RRC Prayagraj Various Post Apprentice Recruitment 2026Online Form RRCPYRG Advt. No. : RRC/NCR/Act. Apprentice 01/2026 Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® Official WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM
Important Dates Application Begin : 08/07/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 07/08/2026 Last Date Pay Exam Fee : 07/08/2026 Merit List : As per Schedule
Application Fee General / OBC / EWS: 100 /- SC / ST : 0/- All Category Female : 0/- Pay the Examination Fees  Through Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking Fees Mode Only.

NCR Prayagraj Act Apprentice Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 07/07/2026 Minimum Age : 15 Years . Maximum Age : 24 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per Railway NCR Prayagraj Apprentice Recruitment Rules.
NCR Prayagraj Apprentice Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details Total : 1853 Post
Class 10 High School Exam With Minimum 50% Marks and ITI / NCVT Certificate in Related Trade
For RRC Prayagraj Apprentice Online Form 2026 : Trade / Division Wise Vacancy Details Read the Notification.

How to Fill Railway RRC NCR Prayagraj Apprentice Recruitment Online Form 2026 Railway RRB Technician Recruitment for Various Post Candidate Can Apply Between 08/07/2026 to 07/08/2026 Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in Railway RRC NCR Prayagraj Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
